action_set_definitions.name: get_application_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current full state of the zoning variance application, including status, fee status, document checklist, and public notice status.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application (e.g., 'VAR-2024-88').

action_set_definitions.name: get_zoning_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves specific technical metrics of the current proposal related to the 50% Rule (conformity) and the 25% intensification cap.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

action_set_definitions.name: update_proposal_parameters
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies the expansion size or renovation scope to ensure compliance with zoning caps. Use this to avoid triggering the 50% Rule or exceeding the 25% Variance Cap.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

expansion_percentage.description: The requested increase in floor area (must be <= 25).

renovation_cost_ratio.description: The cost of improvements relative to assessed value (must be < 50 to avoid site conformity trigger).

action_set_definitions.name: upload_required_document
action_set_definitions.description: Uploads a specific document to the application file to satisfy the documents_checklist.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

document_type.description: The name of the document as required by the checklist (e.g., 'SitePlan', 'GrandfatheredStatusProof').

action_set_definitions.name: process_fee_payment
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the payment for the application processing fee to move the status forward.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

action_set_definitions.name: dispatch_public_notices
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers the legal notification process for neighbors within the 200ft radius as required by law.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_rebuttal_statement
action_set_definitions.description: Submits a formal response to the Board of Zoning Adjustment addressing community opposition or clarifying the necessity of the expansion for viability.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

statement_text.description: The text content of the rebuttal emphasizing 'viability' and 'grandfathered' status.

state_description.application_id: Unique identifier for the zoning variance application.
state_description.status: Current status of the application (e.g., Draft, Submitted, Under Review, Hearing Scheduled, Approved, Denied).
state_description.applicant_info: Details of the person or entity requesting the variance.
state_description.fee_status: Payment status of the application processing fee (e.g., Unpaid, Processing, Paid).
state_description.documents_checklist: A map of required documents and whether they have been uploaded/verified.
state_description.public_notices_sent: Whether neighbors within 200ft have been legally notified of the variance request.
state_description.hearing_date: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the scheduled Zoning Board of Adjustment hearing.
state_description.opposition_count: Number of formal letters of opposition received from the community.
